symptoms.symptom_name: Rapidly progressive facial, neck and bilateral upper-limb swelling and plethora with head-pressure sensation, legs spared

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Upper-body-only oedema/plethora with spared legs is the hallmark of SVC obstruction, distinguishing it from biventricular cardiac failure.
Cardiac failure produces dependent (leg) oedema; isolated upper-body oedema argues against it.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe dyspnoea at rest — orthopnoea (cannot lie flat), unable to speak in full sentences, tachypnoea

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Malignant superior vena cava obstruction with airway compression
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Resting dyspnoea with inability to lie flat indicates critical mediastinal/airway compromise and a large pleural effusion.
Haemoptysis in a heavy smoker with weight loss and chronic cough is a cardinal lung-cancer alarm symptom.

symptoms.symptom_name: Four-month persistent cough with ~8 kg unintentional weight loss in a long-standing heavy smoker

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chronic cough plus constitutional weight loss in a heavy smoker is a high-risk lung-cancer prodrome.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Mediastinal invasion by central lung mass (recurrent laryngeal nerve palsy)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: New hoarseness with a central mass suggests left recurrent laryngeal nerve involvement — a marker of mediastinal extension.

symptoms.symptom_name: Reliever inhaler used repeatedly with no benefit

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Complete lack of response to a beta-2 agonist argues against reversible bronchospasm and points to a mechanical obstruction.

symptoms.symptom_name: Resting hypoxia — SpO2 ~91% on a home fingertip oximeter

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Patient-obtainable home oximetry showing hypoxia corroborates the reported severity; admissible in telehealth but unverified.

symptoms.symptom_name: Distended, non-pulsatile jugular veins failing to collapse on inspiration, with superficial chest-wall venous collaterals

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Non-collapsing distended neck veins with chest-wall collaterals are the definitive physical signs of SVC obstruction — a clinician inspection/examination finding, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Stony dullness to percussion and decreased breath sounds at the right lung base (pleural effusion)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Percussion and auscultation findings of an effusion require a physically-present clinician; sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Contrast-enhanced CT chest showing a central lung mass / hilar-mediastinal adenopathy compressing the SVC

investigation_details.expected_result: Central lung mass / hilar-mediastinal lymphadenopathy compressing the superior vena cava, right pleural effusion
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: SVC obstruction and the causative mass go unconfirmed; emergency imaging is a hospital step the AI cannot perform.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Contrast CT confirms the mechanism and the causative mass; never obtainable in telehealth.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Upper-body oedema/plethora + orthopnoeic dyspnoea + hoarseness + non-collapsing neck veins together are diagnostic of mechanical SVC obstruction by a mediastinal mass.
Haemoptysis + chronic cough with weight loss + new hoarseness in a heavy smoker is a high-risk lung-cancer presentation warranting urgent work-up.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency hospital assessment with contrast-enhanced CT chest
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms SVC obstruction and the causative mass and guides emergency corticosteroid/stent/radiotherapy decisions — a hospital step after 000 transfer, not a telehealth order.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Tissue biopsy / histology and molecular typing
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Distinguishes SCLC from NSCLC to direct definitive systemic therapy; performed in hospital, cannot be done remotely.
Irrelevant and unsafe to pursue during an acute obstructive emergency — do not delay 000 to gather home measurements.
